case_title: RANDY HINER et al VS. KRIS KAKKAR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HINER, RANDY HINER, BRANDI AS TO DEFENDANT KAKKAR, KRIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED ON 09-29-14 TO BRANDI HINER. ENVELOPE STAMPED, "RETURN TO SENDER-ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN-UNABLE TO FORWARD"

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. "DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE IS GRANTED", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
